changes.summary: Canonical BC-12 magic-link entry route: /a/[token] redirects to GET /api/v1/auth/link/:token. Comment documents canonical role and legacy /auth/link redirect target.
Legacy route now 302-redirects to /a/[token] instead of duplicating API proxy. Empty-token handling unchanged (login?error=link_expired). Token TTL unchanged (API inv-24 redeem layer).

notes: Flow: /auth/link/:token -> 302 /a/:token -> 302 /api/v1/auth/link/:token. MAGIC_LINK_PATH default /a aligns with canonical web route.
